claimText: Under the Food Safety and Standards Act, 2006, FSSAI approval is mandatory for the import, manufacture, use, or sale of GM food in India.
evidenceExcerpt: The regulatory framework includes the Food Safety and Standards Act, 2006, which requires FSSAI approval for GM food. FSSAI approval is mandatory for import, manufacture, use, or sale of GM food.
examUse: Statement-based question on the regulatory authority for GM food consumption and trade.
distractorHooks: GEAC is the sole authority for approving the sale of GM food
Ministry of Agriculture regulates the import of GM food

claimText: The Review Committee on Genetic Manipulation (RCGM), which monitors R&D projects involving GMOs, operates under the Department of Biotechnology (DBT).
evidenceExcerpt: The Review Committee on Genetic Manipulation (RCGM) under the DBT monitors R&D. RCGM operates under the Department of Biotechnology (DBT) to monitor R&D projects.
examUse: Correct-pair question matching regulatory committees to their parent ministries or departments.
distractorHooks: RCGM operates under the Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change (MoEFCC)
RCGM operates under the Department of Science and Technology (DST)

claimText: The State Biotechnology Coordination Committee (SBCC) is responsible for reviewing safety and control measures for Genetically Modified Organisms (GMOs) at the state level.
evidenceExcerpt: The State Biotechnology Coordination Committee (SBCC) reviews safety in institutions. SBCC reviews safety and control measures for GMOs at the state level.
examUse: Statement-based question on the decentralized regulatory framework for GMOs.
distractorHooks: SBCC grants final approval for the commercial release of GM crops
State Pollution Control Boards review GMO safety in institutions

claimText: The District Level Committee (DLC) inspects GMO compliance and reports its findings to the State Biotechnology Coordination Committee (SBCC) or the Genetic Engineering Appraisal Committee (GEAC).
evidenceExcerpt: the District Level Committee (DLC) inspects and reports compliance. DLC inspects and reports compliance to SBCC or GEAC.
examUse: Statement-based question on the hierarchy of GMO compliance reporting and inspection.
distractorHooks: DLC reports directly to the Ministry of Agriculture
DLC has the authority to penalize and ban GM crops independently
